title: Harvey & Mason Pack of 6 Exquisite Gold Glitter Christmas Crackers - 13.5" Metallic White Festive Holly Foliage Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations - Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: This set of six handmade Harvey & Mason Christmas crackers features a sophisticated gold and white colour scheme, perfect for adding elegance to festive celebrations.
The design alternates between shimmering gold textured finishes and intricate gold floral and foliage patterns on crisp white backgrounds for a striking look.
Each cracker is finished with a perfectly tied gold satin ribbon and golden bead accents, enhancing their luxurious and opulent presentation.
Measuring approximately 13.5 inches, these deluxe crackers include a paper hat, festive joke or motto, and a carefully chosen gift for added fun and surprise.
Presented in recyclable packaging, these crackers combine premium festive style with eco-conscious design, making them a thoughtful Christmas table choice.
description: Product Description Exquisite Christmas Crackers Bring style, sparkle, and festive tradition to your table with these sets of 6 handmade Harvey & Mason Christmas crackers. Available in silver, gold, red, and classic foliage designs, each cracker adds elegance, fun, and surprise to your holiday celebrations, creating lasting memories. Exquisite Handmade Christmas Crackers – Elegance, Tradition & Festive Fun Luxurious Red Velvet Finish Add elegance to your table with handmade red Christmas crackers featuring flocked floral detail, satin bows, and golden family celebrations. Traditional Christmas Charm Classic holly, foliage, and robins bring timeless festive style to your table with handmade Christmas crackers designed to delight guests this season. Golden Elegance & Sparkle Shimmering gold textures with floral accents and satin ribbons create a celebration. Handmade Christmas crackers add luxury and joy to your table. Sophisticated Silver Style Silver sheen and intricate patterns add sparkle and grace to any Christmas setting. Handmade Christmas crackers bring festive style to your table. 6 Exquisite Red Flock 13.5" Crackers Rich Red Festive Luxury Add elegance to your table with deep red crackers, flocked floral patterns, and satin bows. Each handmade cracker includes a hat, joke, and gift for festive fun, with deluxe detailing that makes them perfect for family Christmas dinners, parties, and holiday table celebrations. Velvet Flocked Detailing These striking red crackers feature luxurious flocking and golden beads. A traditional snap, hat, and surprise gift complete the celebration, with handmade Christmas crackers that add elegance and festive joy to your table, perfect for family gatherings, parties, and holiday dinners. 6 Exquisite Robin 13.5" Crackers Classic Christmas Robins Holly, berries, and robins combine with gold flourishes for a timeless Christmas look. Finished with velvet bows, each cracker includes a hat, joke, and gift, with handmade Christmas crackers that bring festive tradition, luxury, and joy to your table for family dinners and celebrations. Festive Foliage & Gold Touches Traditional charm meets luxury with robin motifs, pearl accents, and festive detailing. Handmade crackers with surprises inside bring joy to every guest, making them a perfect addition to Christmas dinners, family parties, and holiday table celebrations with classic festive style. 6 Exquisite Gold Foliage 13.5" Crackers Golden Elegance & Sparkle Stunning gold tones with floral detailing and satin bows bring luxury to your table. Each cracker includes a festive hat, motto, and surprise gift, with handmade Christmas crackers that add sparkle, elegance, and joy to family dinners, parties, and holiday table celebrations. Luxurious Metallic Design Handmade in shimmering gold with bead accents, these crackers add glamour and festive cheer. Traditional contents ensure fun for all, with Christmas crackers that bring sparkle, style, and festive joy to your holiday table, making them perfect for family gatherings, dinners, and parties. 6 Exquisite Silver 13.5" Crackers Sophisticated Silver Style Elegant silver textures and patterns tied with satin bows create a refined festive display. Each cracker holds a hat, joke, and small gift, with handmade Christmas crackers that add sparkle, tradition, and festive joy to holiday tables, family dinners, and parties throughout the season. Shimmering Metallic Finish Add sparkle to your celebration with handmade silver crackers. Complete with a snap, hat, and gift, they make every table feel special, with elegant Christmas crackers that bring festive charm, tradition, and joy to family dinners, parties, and holiday table celebrations.
